# lucaong/minisearch `minisearch@7.2.0`
**Tags:** next: 5.0.0-beta1, latest: 7.2.0

**References:** [package.json](./.skilld/pkg/package.json) • [README](./.skilld/pkg/README.md) • [Docs](./.skilld/docs/_INDEX.md)

## Search

Use `skilld search "query" -p minisearch` instead of grepping `.skilld/` directories. Run `skilld search --guide -p minisearch` for full syntax, filters, and operators.
